lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The engine and transmission require mechanical attention. The exterior has significant rust and body damage. The interior shows heavy wear, and several electronic features are non-functional.
Mint condition.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery. The car is currently non-functional and requires major mechanical repairs.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained over the years. The engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts as it should, and the overall mechanical state is solid with no immediate repairs needed. The interior is clean with only minor signs of use, and the exterior paint still looks great, though there are a few small scratches and chips consistent with its age. All electronics and features are fully functional. It’s a reliable car that is ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a major restoration project. The engine has a severe internal knock and shows signs of a blown head gasket, leading to frequent overheating. The transmission slips badly in second and third gears, making the car unsafe to drive on public roads. Additionally, there are significant rust spots on the lower door panels and the interior upholstery is heavily worn and torn. This car will require a tow and substantial mechanical work to be roadworthy again.

Experience automotive excellence with this stunning vehicle! It is in pristine, showroom-quality condition, both inside and out. Meticulously maintained and virtually indistinguishable from a brand-new car, it offers a flawless and exhilarating driving experience. This is a truly rare find for anyone seeking perfection on the road!

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile reflects an uncompromising commitment to preservation, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior. Mechanically superior and visually indistinguishable from new, this unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.

Hey folks! 🚗 I’m honestly so sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home! It’s in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this car since day one, and it’s been kept in a climate-controlled garage. You won’t find a single scratch or dent. It drives like a dream! Come take a look, you won’t be disappointed! ✨

This specimen represents the zenith of the 997.2 platform, featuring the naturally aspirated 3.8L flat-six with Direct Fuel Injection (DFI) for optimized thermal efficiency and linear power delivery. The drivetrain is paired with a lightning-fast PDK dual-clutch transmission, while the chassis benefits from Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) and a mechanical limited-slip differential. Every component, from the four-piston monobloc calipers to the cross-drilled ventilated rotors, remains in concours-level state with zero evidence of track fatigue or mechanical wear. The factory finish is unblemished, and the undercarriage reflects a climate-controlled existence, showing pristine heat shields and factory-spec bushings. This is a collector-grade example with a comprehensive service dossier and a flawless bore-scope report.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No scratches or mechanical issues. Clean title. Full service records included.

This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since its original purchase. The exterior features a flawless factory finish protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating, showing zero stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin retains its factory-fresh scent, with premium leather upholstery that remains supple and entirely free of creases, bolster wear, or fading. Every electronic component and driver-assist feature functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is indistinguishable from new, with a smooth, responsive power delivery and a complete service history documented in a comprehensive binder. This is a rare opportunity to own a truly pristine example that satisfies the standards of the most discerning collector.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting zero compromises in its aesthetic or mechanical integrity. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers an unparalleled ownership experience.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance and reliability. This is an exceptional opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such uncompromising quality and preservation.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this car is—it's in absolutely pristine condition! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it garage-kept and detailed so it still has that incredible showroom shine. It drives like an absolute dream and feels just like new. If you're looking for a ride that’s been loved and meticulously cared for, this beauty is definitely the one for you. Come see it for yourself!
This E92 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the high-revving S65 V8 with its 8,250
Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Pristine interior. Full maintenance records. All systems functional.

This 2021 BMW M340i xDrive is the definition of a showroom-quality vehicle. Meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner, the Alpine White exterior is flawless, free of stone chips or swirl marks, and protected by a premium ceramic coating. Inside, the Mocha Vernasca leather remains supple and retains that new-car scent, with zero wear on the bolsters or controls. Every electronic feature, from the head-up display to the Harman Kardon surround sound, functions perfectly. This vehicle has been exclusively garage-kept and serviced strictly at the dealership, with a comprehensive maintenance history included. The 19-inch M-Double spoke wheels are pristine, showing no curb rash, and are wrapped in high-performance tires with excellent tread. This is an exceptional example for a discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that is indistinguishable from new.

Presenting an unrivaled example of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition. Meticulously preserved and showing no signs of wear, it represents the definitive standard for the discerning collector. Every surface, from the flawless coachwork to the immaculate cabin, reflects a history of fastidious care. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such caliber, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Meticulously preserved and rigorously inspected, this unit offers a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality and aesthetic perfection. Available now for immediate acquisition.

Hey there! You've seriously gotta see this beauty—it's honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken absolute pride in keeping it in pristine, flawless condition, and it still has that wonderful new-car smell. It drives like a total dream and has been pampered every single mile. If you're looking for a ride that feels brand new, this is definitely the one for you! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or want to come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 represents a superlative example of the S54-powered icon. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six exhibits factory-spec compression across all cylinders, with the double-VANOS system recently overhauled for optimal variable valve timing. The chassis remains structurally flawless, featuring proactive subframe reinforcement to maintain torsional rigidity. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a factory M-variable differential lock. Every suspension component, from the bushings to the dampers, retains its original damping profile, ensuring signature telepathic steering response. Finished in a concours-level exterior with zero oxidation, this specimen is mechanically and aesthetically irreproachable.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Flawless exterior and interior. Full service history included.

Step into what can only be described as a time capsule. This vehicle is in flawless, showroom-ready condition, having been meticulously stored in a climate-controlled garage and professionally detailed on a monthly basis. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free of any swirl marks, rock chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no visible wear, and the interior still carries that new-car aroma. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the panoramic sunroof, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a complete history of preventative maintenance performed exclusively by certified technicians. With exceptionally low mileage and a chassis that looks as clean as the day it left the factory, this is an unparalleled opportunity for a buyer who demands perfection without compromise.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence, featuring an unblemished exterior and a meticulously preserved interior that reflects a standard of care rarely encountered on the secondary market. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering the next owner an uncompromising driving experience. For the discerning individual seeking a vehicle of investment-grade quality, this offering represents a singular opportunity.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in showroom condition and representing the definitive standard of its model year. Meticulously maintained and free from any aesthetic or mechanical compromise, this specimen reflects a level of care reserved for the most discerning automotive enthusiasts. An acquisition of this caliber offers an unparalleled opportunity to secure a vehicle in its most pristine state.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this beauty in person. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and I’ve kept it in stunning, showroom-ready condition. It drives like a total dream and looks just as gorgeous as the day it rolled off the lot. I’m honestly a little sad to see it go, but I know you’re going to absolutely fall in love with it the moment you get behind the wheel!

Offering a collector-grade E46 M3 in impeccable mechanical health. This chassis features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine, utilizing individual throttle bodies and Double-VANOS for optimized volumetric efficiency across the rev range. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a factory-spec variable M-differential lock. All critical preventative maintenance has been proactively addressed, including rod bearing replacement and comprehensive rear subframe reinforcement
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No defects.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. The deep metallic finish glows with a mirror-like luster, completely free of swirls, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is a pristine sanctuary; the premium hand-stitched leather remains supple and unmarked, still carrying that distinct new-car aroma. Every technological feature, from the high-fidelity surround sound system to the intuitive driver-assist suite, functions exactly as it did the day it was delivered. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous, documented maintenance schedule and having been exclusively stored in a climate-controlled garage. From the flawless alloy wheels to the crystal-clear optics of the LED headlamps, every inch of this car reflects meticulous care. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle in truly impeccable, factory-fresh condition.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from its original delivery state. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical perfection, this offering is tailored for the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising quality and aesthetic integrity.
